name: Soapbox - Live Performers In Your House

reviews.review_description:
Hello Soapbox Team,

I think Soapbox has a lot of potential and is a great platform. My main suggestion would be to add more music genres. A wider variety of styles would make the experience more enjoyable and appeal to more users.

Thank you for your work, and I look forward to future updates.

Best regards,
A Soapbox User

reviews.review_title: Private concert in your living room
reviews.review_description:
Who has not dreamed of having a band playing a private concert for you at your own home? Now with Quest 3 AR and this app it is possible. I like the idea very much and hope that we get much more content, as well as famous bands in the future! Thanks for your great work!

Suggested improvements from my side:
- The actors should directly look more in my direction, that means that I have more the feeling that it is a private concert for me, like is at the App Amaze
- More Rock and Metal Content with whole band members

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to write a review! Let us know if you have specific bands in mind that you would like to see on Soapbox.

reviews.review_title: Musicians: Jam w/ your Favorite Artists!
reviews.review_description: If you're a musician, you can jam with your favorite artists in your living room. Just play the performance, grab your guitar, and rock out. It really feels like jamming with Buckcherry, Norma Jean, etc. This is amazing!
Coming from a videographer and seeing the new wave of how we see entertainment ; soapbox is definitely worth the download and they are constantly working and building to expand the app!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, Ben! We really appreciate the feedback.

reviews.review_description:
I'm giving it 5 stars because the rating seems way too low for what you get. It would be a 4 otherwise since there's room for improvement.

The biggest problem I have currently is a lack of music variety. It's all very Hip-hop and R&B coated. Where's pop, EDM, chillout etc.?

The other big one is for mixed reality performances where the lighting is all screwed up when you switch to their stock VR environment. Artists get all these visible artifacts which kills the experience.

Otherwise it's great. I see you've really stepped up your efforts lately and content comes out at a steady pace now. Keep up the good work. :)

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for the review and feedback. Our biggest mission at the moment is getting a larger variety of music genres on there. Keep an eye out! :)

reviews.review_description: It's ok for a demo I guess they won't let me buy anything with meta quest coins or Google play coins. Might as well say get a three months subscription and the review on YouTube is from a whole different game which I can't find

I have just removed the app from my headset. Despite the time that has passed and the multiple updates released, dynamic occlusion still hasn’t been implemented, which I consider an essential feature for the experience.

Additionally, the app’s authentication system is extremely inconvenient. It forgets the login details every time, requiring me to re-enter my username and password on each access. I often don’t remember them, and going through the email verification process repeatedly becomes frustrating enough that I eventually choose not to log in at all.

Ideally, the app should require authentication only once. Furthermore, after downloading content, it should be usable offline without needing to reconnect or enter credentials every time.




----

This is perfect, but for a five-star rating, I think you should include:

1. The ability to use the app offline once the content has been downloaded, meaning you can open the app without an internet connection and enjoy the downloaded content.

Now, however, you still need to be connected to the internet to access the app, even if you've downloaded content.

3D sound, the most important thing of all! It should be so that when you get close to the singer, you hear the sound coming from their voice, and when you move away or turn left or right, you hear it far away to the right or left, respectively. In short, what's called 3D sound, which would add a lot of immersion!

Dynamic occlusion of the user's hands and arms, and of the environment in general, so you get a feeling of immersion and total fusion with the real environment. Dynamic occlusion uses less resources than you might think, so try it!

------



Update: I just made the update you released, thanks!
Honestly, for a moment I was under the illusion that it had reached dynamic occlusion and/or an offline mode to start the app offline to play content already downloaded. 

As soon as I see it I can't wait to stay 5 stars! I'm not currently using the app much: I'm a big fan of dynamic occlusion!😃

Thank you for your commitment to constantly improve the app, I saw that you added new paid singers (but they don't really seem like my genre to be honest), maybe in the future there was a way to see a preview in a small window before being able to make the purchase? it would be easier to decide whether to make the purchase or not?

--------



Please... Please.... Please!... Add a Dynamic Occlusion!!!🙏🙏🙏  (On/off) ... Please!



pretty good but once you download a song, the app should be able to be used offline, which is not the case at the moment. 

furthermore, to make this mixed reality experience truly complete you need dynamic occlusion, the way for example that your arms will be displayed in front or behind the 3D model depending on the distance you are at as well as the rest of the scene

you also have to keep the viewer on your head throughout the long process of downloading a video, otherwise the video won't load! this is rather useless and also annoying

developer_response.body:
My man, sorry to hear... I hope you come back and visit soon. We have recently expanded licensing agreements that are allowing us significantly expand the release schedule. Lots of great stuff on the way!

We agree that dynamic occlusion will elevate the experience. It's on the list, it's just with a small team we are balancing demands and haven't gotten to that yet.

Sorry to hear about the login issue. I'm reporting this to the dev team to try to figure out what's happening.

Offline mode is another thing we are working toward. There are many rights holders involved in music content, and thus many rules around how content can be stored and accessed. This is in the works, it just has not been released yet.

Thanks for being one of our earliest users/testers and we really appreciate all of the feedback!

reviews.review_description: I’m blow away by the implications of what soapbox can become. It’s a true step forward in entertainment. ￼
This app is awesome! I can’t wait for Meta to make a better headset.
It’s like Buddy Guy Is Playing at My House.
Scary realistic. Love this app 🫶
I absolutely LOVE this app!! When I showed my boi Amanda Nicole he almost passed out smdh!! It was unreal......or real lol.....
T-Pain in my house. What’s not to like?!?

A great concept but needs the content to hopefully flow quick to keep people wanting to come back.

At the moment its a bit frustrating having to keep coming back to see either no new ones added or artists you have no idea who they are and don't want to chance paying for something you then won't like.

Defo needs a free sample for every artist, even if just 15 seconds of one of there tracks to get a feel if irs something that you then want to pay for.

At the mo its defo in my selection to demo what Mixed Reality can really be used for.

reviews.review_title: Immersive Music app Like No Other.
reviews.review_description:
Want to try something different from the 2D 180° or 360° music videos? Do you want to see the next level of 3D?  

Download this app. 

Being able to download and experience this app was truly worth it.

This app brings your singers, lecturers in front of you. Not only that but to make you experience them in real life size and walk around them, they truly feel the presence in the room. And Hey..  you get to experience the same in both VR and AR modes.

For the very first time, I get to walk around the singer and see the singer from all directions like a real person with me. I personally enjoy both settings VR and AR, but for some reason singers looked more real in the VR than in AR.

This app is one in a thousand apps that is a must-have if you own a VR headset. It is like when you need to download a rollercoaster app to try what it is like being in a rollercoaster 🎢, it's the same with Soapbox, you need to try it to experience it understand what it is like to watch music content in Soapbox. It is something new, different and I love it👌😎.

I wanna thank the support team for their great support I've got and their follow-ups with me, especially the one who was following up with me on  X account🙏💐♥️.

The app is in its very early stages, but stable and easy to navigate through.  The sky is the limit for applications of Soabbox and I can't wait for more content and new things and ideas they can do.

developer_response.body:
My man! Thanks so much for taking the time to check out Soapbox!!!
Please check back often, lot's of great new releases coming weekly!

reviews.review_description:
Soapbox impresses with the quality and realism of its holographic concerts. The performances, captured in volumetric video, offer a rare sense of presence.
A unique musical immersion with artists filmed in 360° volumetric video, captured via a 48-camera system, giving you the impression that they are physically appearing in your living room as stunningly realistic holograms.
The catalog is packed with diverse styles: from superstars like T-Pain and Buddy Guy to exclusive unreleased duets (like Tank and Aaliyah), and powerful performances by Norma Jean.
The interface is fluid, setup is simple, and the feeling of intimacy with the artist is sensational.
A truly immersive alternative to traditional concerts, it demonstrates how VR can revolutionize live music.
Several content items are free, while others cost around €3 per track.
Downloads are space-intensive (around 10 GB per song).
One of my best XR experiences!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for checking out Soapbox!!!
Please check back often, lots of great releases on the way.
We are working diligently on reducing overall file sizes, this should be improving continually. Thank you!!!

This is the first step into the VR/MR future! WOW!

When this becomes advanced and the holograms become better quality, it would be an epic future experience. 

However for now trying to be more creative with what currently available helps, also more famous artists would be epic experience.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for checking out Soapbox!
Please check back often, we have lots of great releases on the way!!

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic app, really gives the impression that the artist is right in the room with you, well done to the developers. I've found that using it with Quest Game Optimizer really helps to increase the resolution. 

Some suggestions:

1) Some of the acts have some artifacts that could do with a bit of a tidy up, this is particularly noticeable around the feet area. "Aaron Gibson - Real Bad Timing" also has some artifacts that are several feet in front of him on the floor.

2) I've noticed that some of the artists can really appear to look into your eyes if I position them correctly but it takes a bit of experimenting to get them into the right position. It would be good if when you are recording, that the artists have a particular primary camera that they can concentrate on looking into the most (not all the time but for the most part). Then you could add an option/button to have the artist reorient to face you (as if the viewer were in primary camera position), this could really give the impression that they are singing directly to you. You could possibly also have them automatically follow your headset position in realtime, however I think that might look a little odd as they would be constantly spinning around on the spot as you move, better to just have them reorient on a button press.

3) Positional audio, having the audio emanating directly from the artist's position would be great, so that when we turn our head or move, the positional audio would reflect the change in our position.

4) Alpha transparent shadows under the artist. Since you have a 3D model of the artist, perhaps it might be possible for you to create a real time diffuse transparent shadow effect on our floor in mixed reality.

5) Real time lighting effects, it would be nice if we could create our own lighting on the artist, position a directional spotlight for instance or even simply make adjustments to the brightness of the artist so that it more closely managed our mixed reality environment.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for checking out Soapbox and for your detailed review!
We have begun to implement dynamic audio and are working on lighting, etc. Please check back often as we have many great releases on the way!!

reviews.review_title: Very good and hoping for more like this
reviews.review_description:
Is very good, but with high quality captures comes high GB files dimensions.
Not sure if better compression can be achieved, but right now a single download take a fair bit of time and occupy a lot of space, so be mindful of your memory space, especially if like me you use the 128GB Quest 3 model.

Also some artist are not accessible for me, i see a "!" and can't download. And is the majority of them unfortunally.

developer_response.body:
Hey lpnonauta! Thanks so much for checking out Soapbox!
Are you still having trouble with any content? The "!" typically indicates an issue with internet connection.

We are currently working on reducing file sizes and have recently added a "downloaded" section, that allows you to easily locate and remove performances that you are finished with!

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you are having any trouble! support@soapbox.us

reviews.review_description:
This is cool, a great format to be part of performances!
Works great on the Meta Quest 3  and Meta Quest PRO.

GUI might need some updates scrolling thru various shows/concerts, but I expect it will be updated soon!

As always I would really have the option to utilize higher resolutions if possible to enhance the experience even more!
Also try to get some more international artists!

I didn't have any problems getting in and purchasing content.  I appreciate respecting my email address that it's the one I provided and not the one from Meta.

The response of clicking to play and playing was very fast.  The trade off was achieved by reducing the number of polygons in the mesh and having a video texture.

I was disappointed I couldn't create my own hologram, but I understand why.

I almost removed the one star because the same day I experienced 4DGS, which didn't have the very fast download, but had tremendous resolution.  I fully expect after you reprocess your videos the platform will improve the quality of old videos.

I can't tell if it was the Quest 3 or not, but the hand controls weren't as good as the controllers.   I tend to not replace my batteries in my controls and don't use programs that don't support hands only.

I am very pleased with your app!!!😀I'm giving it a full five-star rating because everything is running quite smoothly, and I have had only one issue so far. The issue was my account sign in, but that was quickly resolved! I am absolutely crazy about Daedric!!😀❤️I think she rocks!!! quite literally!! She reminded me of the musicians back in the 80s!! I've also checked out Eliza Grace, too!! 😀❤️ PLEASE PLEASE enable us to resize the singer to any size we want, just like in the Scenez app!! That would be AWESOME!!!😀👍 Keep up the great work, and THANK YOU SOAPBOX!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for checking out Soapbox! Please check back regularly as we have many great releases dropping soon!

reviews.review_description: This app is amazing, the only problem is the lack of a wide range of content for all audiences.. it seems like this is made soley for black culture almost exclusively.

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking us out! We're based in ATL, so lots of hip hop initially. We have many artists on the way from a wide range of genres. Please stay in touch as we finalize some of these licensing deals and really get things moving!

reviews.review_description: Really cool to show my friends how it works. I just wish it had more artist that I’ve heard of. I’ve only heard of buddy guy and one other. I guess I’m showing my age.

reviews.review_description: I really Like it, please expand the talent and genres. Would Love to see more content and a wider selection. Also throw in "Free" performances not just intros. Looking forward to more.

reviews.review_description: NEXT LEVEL
Looks Great when demo artist stand in room...But every time I try to download artists it stops halfway with exclamation point...Please fix...Would love to get into this App..It could be AWESOME...

developer_response.body:
Hi Peepopo, really sorry to hear you are having problems downloading content with Soapbox. There are 2 possible causes of the issue you describe:

Firstly, please ensure you are wearing the headset throughout the download process. The headset will automatically fall into sleep mode and disconnect the download if you place it on the side while you wait.
An alternate fix is to temporarily turn off the headsets "Auto-Sleep" feature in the settings menu. This allows the headset display to remain on even when your not wearing it. This will allow downloads to continue.

Secondly, please ensure you have a consistent strong internet connection which doesn't drop out.

I hope this helps, thank you for the feedback.

reviews.review_title: This is the future of music tracks
reviews.review_description: Great holographic dynamic applications to bring the singers and music group in your home I hope to have more songs soon in this great application I highly recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! More music is coming soon.

reviews.review_description: The ability to see artists perform in your room is amazing. It looks very convincing!

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying out our app!

reviews.review_description: Feels like the artist is right there in your room. Very neat. Need a lot more content asap.

developer_response.body: Thank you! More content coming ASAP!

reviews.review_title: Great. But what it with the audio?
reviews.review_description: The concept, the UI and the 3D experience is great. But why is the sound of all recordings in MONO ? I am sure there were a few hundreds kbit/s additional possible for a second audio channel. It is a music app after all, and at the beginning there is a recommendation for using it with headphones, which doesn't make much sense on mono sound. So why not having a nice wide spatial or at least stereo audio experience? Don't get me wrong. It is not a crappy sound, but leaves much potential unused.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! Our initial filetype only supported mono audio but we have since begun to upload higher quality stereo audio when adding tracks. We'll be updating all of the existing tracks with stereo audio asap!

reviews.review_description: The experience is very cool however the price for the videos is way too expensive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying our app and for your feedback. We are constantly striving to improve the app and we will take your perspective seriously as we move forward.

reviews.review_title: WOW !!!!!!! The best VR app ever
reviews.review_description: One of the most innovative and revolutionary VR applications, one that encourages using this technology. I'm waiting for more content and greater musical diversity :) It's a pity that this library is growing so slowly because I check it eagerly every day. From my ideas: you could add object scaling and the ability to record guitar with the artist :D I love this application

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and for trying Soapbox! Who would you like to see added to our app?
